top_signals.title: Weak yen gives Tokyo edge in global startup race, Koike says
top_signals.summary: Under Koike's leadership, Tokyo has launched initiatives to establish itself as a global financial center and startup hub as part of an effort to boost economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Vietnam sets new crypto trading fines on par with drunk-driving penalties
top_signals.summary: Domestic investors who trade crypto without going through a licensed service provider face fines of roughly $1,140 to $1,900.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan team eyes world’s first pig-kidney transplant to human fetus
top_signals.summary: The therapeutic method is supposed to be temporary treatment until dialysis becomes possible for the baby.
